svg.text: The Art of Fugue, Contrapunctus XIV — the B–A–C–H entry (mm.191–196)
third subject = the composer's name as pitches · the score breaks off at m.239 (unfinished)
B♭ – A – C – B♮ = B – A – C – H
third-subject entry: tenor, m.193 — the autograph breaks off at m.239
score encoding: C. S. Sapp, github.com/craigsapp/art-of-the-fugue (after BGA Band 25.1, 1878)
